title: Criminal case against loan defaulter can't continue after DRT-approved settlement: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court has held that criminal proceedings cannot be allowed to continue against a loan defaulter after his loan account dues have been settled through a compromise approved by the Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT) [Vijay Kumar Kela & Anr. v. CBI & Anr.].In a judgment delivered on May 29, a Bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and Ujjal Bhuyan quashed criminal proceedings initiated by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) at the instance of UCO Bank against businessman Vijay Kumar Ke
